```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[已完成] 欧盟AI法案合规研究征调令已发布，明确总目标与边界约束，并指出时限缺失。",
  "updates": {
    "total_target": "完成一份全面的欧盟AI法案合规性评估报告，内容涵盖：欧盟AI法案框架概述、风险分类系统解释、AI客服聊天机器人合规性分类与要求、关键时间表里程碑与合规截止日期、罚款详情、技术合规要求清单以及推荐的合规行动路线图。",
    "boundaries": "1. 仅限研究和分析，禁止发送任何通知或采取任何行动。\n2. 研究对象为公司在欧洲市场开发的AI客服系统。\n3. 研究范围聚焦于欧盟AI法案的合规要求。\n4. 具体研究内容包括：法案框架与立法现状、AI风险分类系统（不可接受、高、有限、最小风险）、AI客服聊天机器人风险等级与具体合规义务、合规时间表、罚款结构与计算方法、技术合规要求（透明度、人工监督、数据治理）、企业合规实践与准备建议。",
    "missing_info": {
      "deadline": "用户未明确指定任务完成时限。"
    }
  }
}

<summary>
[已完成] 确认上一轮JSON输出为大汗征调令阶段的最终产物，无需额外工具调用。
</summary>


上一轮输出的JSON是根据 `[Topology Contract]` 和 `[Institution SOP]` 规定的 `khagan_order` 阶段的最终交付物。它包含了 `decision: "next"`，`summary` 和 `updates`，标志着本阶段任务的完成并向下一阶段 `imperial_plan` 传递信息。

作为 `khagan_order` 角色，我的职责是定义征调目标和边界，而非执行具体操作或编写代码文件。因此，上一轮的JSON输出即是本阶段的全部工作，无需再调用其他工具。

updates.total_target: 完成一份全面的欧盟AI法案合规性评估报告，内容涵盖：欧盟AI法案框架概述、风险分类系统解释、AI客服聊天机器人合规性分类与要求、关键时间表里程碑与合规截止日期、罚款详情、技术合规要求清单以及推荐的合规行动路线图。
updates.boundaries:
1. 仅限研究和分析，禁止发送任何通知或采取任何行动。
2. 研究对象为公司在欧洲市场开发的AI客服系统。
3. 研究范围聚焦于欧盟AI法案的合规要求。
4. 具体研究内容包括：法案框架与立法现状、AI风险分类系统（不可接受、高、有限、最小风险）、AI客服聊天机器人风险等级与具体合规义务、合规时间表、罚款结构与计算方法、技术合规要求（透明度、人工监督、数据治理）、企业合规实践与准备建议。

tumen_quota.task_name: 欧盟AI法案框架与立法现状研究
tumen_quota.objective: 深入研究欧盟AI法案的整体框架、核心原则及当前立法状态。
tumen_quota.expected_output: EU AI Act framework overview 报告部分。

tumen_quota.objective: 详细解读AI风险分类系统，包括不可接受、高、有限、最小风险的定义与示例。
tumen_quota.expected_output: Risk classification system explained 报告部分。

tumen_quota.task_name: AI客服聊天机器人风险定级与合规义务
tumen_quota.objective: 评估AI客服聊天机器人所属的风险层级，并明确其具体的合规义务。
tumen_quota.expected_output: AI chatbot compliance classification and requirements 报告部分。

tumen_quota.objective: 梳理欧盟AI法案的合规时间线、关键里程碑及各阶段生效日期。
tumen_quota.expected_output: Key timeline milestones and compliance deadlines 报告部分。

tumen_quota.objective: 调查欧盟AI法案的处罚结构，包括罚款金额和计算方法。
审查技术合规要求，如透明度、人工监督和数据治理等。
tumen_quota.expected_output: Technical compliance requirement checklist 报告部分。

tumen_quota.task_name: 企业合规实践与准备建议
tumen_quota.objective: 收集企业在欧盟AI法案下的合规实践案例和准备建议。
tumen_quota.expected_output: Recommended compliance action roadmap 报告部分。

updates.decomposition_rule: 各万户将其任务逐级分解为1:10的千户、百户、十户级任务，直至可执行的最小单元，确保任务颗粒度适中且可追溯。
updates.reporting_cycle: 各万户需在万户级执行阶段结束前提交其负责的报告部分，由后续阶段汇总形成完整的合规评估报告。

mingghan_allocations.title: EU AI Act Framework & Legislative Status Research
mingghan_allocations.description: Search for and understand the EU AI Act framework and its current legislative status.

mingghan_allocations.title: AI Risk Classification System Deep Dive
mingghan_allocations.description: Study the AI risk classification system (unacceptable, high, limited, minimal risk) as defined by the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: AI Chatbot Risk Tier Assessment
mingghan_allocations.description: Determine which risk tier an AI customer service chatbot falls into based on the EU AI Act's classification system.

mingghan_allocations.title: AI Chatbot Specific Compliance Obligations
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify the specific compliance obligations for an AI customer service chatbot based on its determined risk tier.

mingghan_allocations.title: Compliance Timeline & Effective Dates Research
mingghan_allocations.description: Understand the compliance timeline, key milestones, and effective dates for each phase of the EU AI Act implementation.

mingghan_allocations.title: Penalty Structure Research
mingghan_allocations.description: Research the penalty structure, including fine amounts and calculation methods, for non-compliance with the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Transparency & Human Oversight
mingghan_allocations.description: Review technical compliance requirements focusing on transparency and human oversight as per the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Data Governance & Other Requirements
mingghan_allocations.description: Review technical compliance requirements focusing on data governance and any other relevant technical aspects of the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Enterprise Compliance Practices & Preparation Advice
mingghan_allocations.description: Search for best practices in enterprise compliance and preparation advice for companies adapting to the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Comprehensive Compliance Report Compilation
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile all research findings into a comprehensive compliance assessment report, covering all specified sections.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

mingghan_allocations.title: Compliance Timeline & Effective Dates Research
mingghan_allocations.description: Understand the compliance timeline, key milestones, and effective dates for each phase of the EU AI Act implementation.

mingghan_allocations.title: Penalty Structure Research
mingghan_allocations.description: Research the penalty structure, including fine amounts and calculation methods, for non-compliance with the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Transparency & Human Oversight
mingghan_allocations.description: Review technical compliance requirements focusing on transparency and human oversight as per the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Data Governance & Other Requirements
mingghan_allocations.description: Review technical compliance requirements focusing on data governance and any other relevant technical aspects of the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Enterprise Compliance Practices & Preparation Advice
mingghan_allocations.description: Search for best practices in enterprise compliance and preparation advice for companies adapting to the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Comprehensive Compliance Report Compilation
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile all research findings into a comprehensive compliance assessment report, covering all specified sections.

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 欧盟AI法案合规研究任务已分解为10个百户级子任务，等待百户级执行。

jaghun_allocations.title: Research the foundational framework and key principles of the EU AI Act.
Analyze the current legislative status and scope of the EU AI Act.
Detail the AI risk classification system (unacceptable, high, limited, minimal risk).
Assess and classify an AI customer service chatbot into its appropriate risk tier.
Identify specific compliance obligations corresponding to the chatbot's determined risk tier.
Outline the key timeline milestones and effective dates for each phase of the EU AI Act.
Investigate the penalty structure, including fine amounts and calculation methodologies.
Research technical compliance requirements focusing on transparency and human oversight.
Research technical compliance requirements focusing on data governance, robustness, and accuracy.
Compile enterprise compliance practices and preparation advice for the EU AI Act.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

event.summary: [执行中] 欧盟AI法案合规研究任务已分解为10个百户级子任务，等待百户级执行。

jaghun_allocations.title: Research the foundational framework and key principles of the EU AI Act.

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 欧盟AI法案合规研究百户级任务已分解为十个十户级子任务。

arban_allocations.title: EU AI Act Framework Overview
arban_allocations.description: Research and summarize the overall framework, scope, and general principles of the EU AI Act, including its legislative status.

arban_allocations.title: EU AI Act Key Definitions and Legal Status
arban_allocations.description: Investigate key definitions within the EU AI Act, its current legal status, and any amendments or ongoing legislative processes.

arban_allocations.title: AI Risk Classification System Analysis
arban_allocations.description: Conduct a detailed study of the AI risk classification system defined in the EU AI Act, covering unacceptable, high, limited, and minimal risk categories.

arban_allocations.title: AI Chatbot Risk Tier Assessment
arban_allocations.description: Assess and determine the specific risk tier an AI customer service chatbot falls into under the EU AI Act's classification system.

arban_allocations.title: Chatbot Specific Compliance Obligations
arban_allocations.description: Identify and detail the specific compliance obligations and requirements for an AI customer service chatbot based on its determined risk tier.

arban_allocations.title: Compliance Timeline and Deadlines
arban_allocations.description: Research and outline the key timeline milestones and effective dates for different phases and provisions of the EU AI Act, including compliance deadlines.

arban_allocations.title: Penalty Structure and Enforcement
arban_allocations.description: Investigate the penalty structure of the EU AI Act, including fine amounts, calculation methods, and enforcement mechanisms.

arban_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Transparency & Human Oversight
arban_allocations.description: Review and document technical compliance requirements related to transparency, explainability, and human oversight for AI systems under the Act.

arban_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Data Governance & Robustness
arban_allocations.description: Examine technical compliance requirements concerning data governance, data quality, cybersecurity, and robustness of AI systems.

arban_allocations.title: Enterprise Compliance Practices & Roadmap
arban_allocations.description: Research existing enterprise compliance practices, gather preparation advice, and propose a preliminary compliance action roadmap for companies developing AI customer service systems.

readiness.details: All 10 Arban units are ready for mobilization and task allocation.

agent_trace.summary: [动员失败] 无法对AI合规研究任务进行户级动员，因任务类型与十户级职责不符。

updates.household_mobilization: 尝试对'AI Regulatory Compliance Research'任务进行户级动员，但发现该任务为纯粹的研究分析，不涉及实际人员集结或户级通知，无法执行动员操作。任务性质与十户级执行节点的'户级动员与集结'核心职责严重不符。
updates.gap_and_reason: 配额任务（AI Regulatory Compliance Research）与十户级执行节点的'户级动员与集结'核心职责存在根本性冲突。十户级节点无法对非动员性质的任务进行人员集结和到位核验，导致动员无法启动。

blockers.reason: Task type mismatch: The 'AI Regulatory Compliance Research' task is a research and analysis task, which is fundamentally incompatible with the 'arban_level_execute' stage's core responsibility of 'household mobilization and headcount verification' as defined in the Institution SOP.
blockers.evidence: Institution SOP for arban_level_execute specifies '执行户级通知、人员集结与到位核验' and '核验实际到位人数、记录缺口与原因'. User Task is 'research the EU AI Act compliance requirements' and 'produce a comprehensive compliance assessment report'.

updates.impact: 十户级动员任务无法完成，因为其上游任务分解将研究性质的任务分配给了物理动员执行层。这将导致后续阶段无法获得预期的动员结果，并可能需要重新评估任务分配策略。

meta.stage_description: 十户级落实动员并回报完成情况。
